description: Manual playground records for known public playgrounds that are missing from the official playground-specific source fields. Keep entries small, source them conservatively, and prefer official park records for area and amenity context.

playgrounds.name: Admiralty Park Playground
playgrounds.reason: Parks@SG publishes Admiralty Park, but its amenity text does not list Playground even though the playground is visible as a public map place.
notes: Curated because official source fields publish the park but do not expose this playground as a playground amenity.
Coordinates point to the playground area rather than the park centroid.
